provenanceNotes: Generated by rerunning Austin Socrata and San Antonio CKAN permit-builder adapters. These are permit-verified active-builder signals, not validated buy boxes or call-ready buyer records.
confidence: high for active builder signal; unknown for buy-box until direct capture

summary.filter: Residential building permits, New work class, one or more housing units, SFR / two-family / secondary apartment classes, issued since 2025-01-01.

source.name: City of Austin Open Data — Issued Construction Permits
source.where: permittype='BP' AND permit_class_mapped='Residential' AND work_class='New' AND housing_units > 0 AND issue_date >= '2025-01-01T00:00:00' AND (permit_class='R- 101 Single Family Houses' OR permit_class='R- 103 Two Family Bldgs' OR permit_class='R- 102 Secondary Apartment')

operatingRules: Permit contractors are buyer-validation candidates, not validated buyers, until buy box/contact is confirmed.
Austin contact_phone may be a permit applicant/contractor phone; treat it as public permit context, not a verified sales/acquisitions line.
No pool/accessory-structure contractors are included in this market batch.
Do not promote seller sourcing until builder geography, lot size, max price, close speed, package recipient, and kill criteria are captured.

summary.filter: Res New Building Permit, New work type, primary contact present, issued since 2025-01-01.

source.name: Open Data SA — Building Permits / PERMITS ISSUED
source.where: "DATE ISSUED" >= '2025-01-01' AND "PERMIT TYPE" = 'Res New Building Permit' AND "WORK TYPE" = 'New' AND "PRIMARY CONTACT" IS NOT NULL AND "ADDRESS" IS NOT NULL

operatingRules: Primary Contact is treated as permit-backed builder/contact evidence, not a validated buyer or confirmed acquisitions contact.
Only Res New Building Permit + New rows are included; garage sale, pool, trade, roof, fence, repair, and remodel permit types are excluded.
No builder is promoted to seller sourcing until buy box, package recipient, max price, close speed, and kill criteria are captured.
